description:
Join us on Saturday, May 9, from 1 - 3 PM at Whispering Vine Fourth St. for a tasting featuring 30+ Pinot Noir.

Tasting Fee: $55 per person

Reserve your spot on Tock

Featured Wines:

  • Kosta Browne Barrel Auction Pinot Noir 2021 – Winery $165 – This limited Sonoma County Barrel Auction release is built from Gap’s Crown, Keefer Ranch, Bootlegger’s Hill and Treehouse Vineyard fruit.
  • Rochioli Estate Pinot Noir 2021 – $99.99 – 94 Robert Parker's Wine Advocate.
  • Paul Hobbs Russian River Pinot Noir 2023 – Winery $80 – 95 James Suckling.
  • Martinelli "Bondi Home Ranch" Russian River Valley Pinot Noir 2022 – Winery $85 – 96 Jeb Dunnuck.
  • Louis Jadot Beaune Clos des Couchereaux Premier Cru 2023 – Winery $80 – 93 Wine Spectator.

Come explore 30+ Pinot Noir Wines and find your favorite bottle. Discover your favorite pour from the lineup.
title: Passion for Pinot Party
